steps.title: Use the pigment clues
steps.content: The passage defines red ocher by iron oxide and plant-based pigments by high carbon. The bead pigment had no iron and a high carbon level.

steps.title: Reject unsupported reasons
steps.content: Choice B adds that ocher was hard to find. Choice C adds a preference based on brightness. Choice D claims the beads are the oldest surviving examples. The test results support the material identification only: some beads used plant-based pigment rather than ocher. The answer is A.
